description_long: This handbag features a striking, armored design with a predominantly black exterior accented by gold metallic studs and spikes. The body is constructed from overlapping, rigid panels that create a shell-like appearance, giving it a bold and protective aesthetic. Gold rivets are symmetrically arranged along the seams, while sharp gold spikes protrude from the sides and bottom, enhancing its edgy look. A large, circular gold handle is attached at the top, suggesting it can be carried by hand or on the arm. The front and back panels are slightly textured, resembling high-quality leather, and the overall silhouette is structured and angular. The interior is likely spacious, with the rigid exterior providing both form and function.
description: A black, armored handbag with gold studs, spikes, and a large circular handle, featuring a structured, shell-like design.
description_view_0: Front view shows the layered black panels, gold studs along the seams, and the central gold handle attachment.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the protruding gold spikes and the textured black panel, with the handle arching to the side.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the circular gold handle in full, more gold studs, and the symmetrical panel arrangement.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirrors view 1, showing the spikes, textured panel, and handle from the other angle.
attribute_strap_type: One large, rigid circular handle, gold in color, designed for hand or arm carrying; not adjustable.
attribute_closure_mechanism: Flap closure at the top center, likely secured by a magnetic snap or similar hidden mechanism.
attribute_decorative_elements: Gold studs along seams, gold spikes on sides and bottom, large gold circular handle.
